Resolves the public product Guid to the tenant-scoped item id, creates a platform job, executes the product AI chat workflow, records AI usage, and returns a TaskResult.

post.summary: Initiate AI-driven scope-of-work draft generation for a quote linked to this opportunity.
post.description:
<!-- x-dtools-meta -->

**Capability:** `opportunities` · **Policy:** `Opportunities:AiTask` · **Access depth:** `WorkflowTask` · **Release stage:** `GenerallyAvailable` · **Release-gated:** yes · **Idempotent:** yes · **Async job:** yes · **Workload:** `AiTaskExecution`

This is the Day 30 gate deliverable — full v2 pipeline:
[Authorize] → PlatformContext from JWT → composite policy → task → AiAssistManager → job → usage ledger → audit.

Creates a platform job, runs AI scope generation, records AI workload usage, and returns a TaskResult. The quote id in the body must belong to the opportunity context available to the caller.

tasks.description: The tasks to create in this batch.

projectId.description: The unique identifier of the parent project.

groupId.description: Optional task-group to assign this task to.

active.description: Always false after a successful deactivation.

subscriptionId.description: The subscription identifier (string, not a Guid).

url.description: The HTTPS URL that will receive webhook POSTs.

eventTypes.description: The event types this subscription is listening for (JSON-serialised).

DTools.Cloud.Api.V2.Controllers.V2Webhoo.description: Response DTO returned after creating a webhook subscription.

items.description: The work items in this page.

pageSize.description: The page size used for this query.

workItemId.description: The work item identifier (string, not a Guid).

state.description: Opaque JSON workspace state controlled by the client/agent.

evaluatedAt.description: UTC timestamp when this feature snapshot was evaluated.

features.description: Feature-level release decisions visible to the current caller.

enabled.description: Whether the current caller can see this feature.

DTools.Cloud.Api.V2.Platform.V2ClientFea.description: Evaluated release summary for one v2 feature.

bearerAuth.description: Entra External ID (CIAM) access token. See the Authentication guide for how to obtain one (device-code via the CLI, or your own OAuth flow).
